title: Redesign Activity Timeline with Pills and Structured Layout

requirements.text: Update ActivityTimeline component to display 'Activity Timeline' as a sub-header at the top of the timeline section

quotes: use the UI in the uploaded image to display the activity timeline showing the sub-header 'Activity Timeline'

acceptanceCriteria: Sub-header 'Activity Timeline' is visible at the top of the activity timeline

requirements.text: Display date and timestamp below the 'Activity Timeline' sub-header for each activity entry

quotes: below it display date and timestamp

acceptanceCriteria: Each activity entry shows date and timestamp
Date and timestamp are positioned directly below the sub-header
Timestamp format is consistent across all entries

requirements.text: Display action pill and outcome pill horizontally arranged below the date/timestamp for each activity entry

quotes: below that display horizontally arranged action pill and outcome pill

acceptanceCriteria: Action pill and outcome pill are displayed side by side horizontally
Pills use appropriate styling to distinguish them as pills (rounded, colored backgrounds)
Pills display relevant action and outcome text

requirements.text: Display the comment text below the horizontally arranged pills for each activity entry

quotes: then display the comment below the pills

acceptanceCriteria: Comment text is displayed below the action and outcome pills
Comment text is readable and properly formatted
Layout maintains vertical flow: sub-header → date/timestamp → pills → comment

requirements.text: Modify the Comment type in backend/main.mo to include action and outcome fields if not already present, and update useGetCaseComments query to return these fields
acceptanceCriteria: Backend Comment type includes action and outcome fields
Frontend can fetch and display action and outcome data for each comment
Data flows correctly from backend to frontend timeline display

constraints: Maintain existing ActivityTimeline component structure and integrate new layout
Preserve existing comment fetching logic using useGetCaseComments
Keep color-coded timeline styling consistent with current design
nonGoals: Changing the comment submission functionality in ActivitySection
Modifying the cases, activities, or documents data structures
